name: dock-panel
title: Dock Panel
description: Collapsible edge-docked inspector with a kit scrollbar body.

api.description: Collapsible edge-docked inspector. Compose a rail of panels with optional header text, custom icons, and a body that owns the kit ScrollArea. Use dismissible for temporary tune panels that leave the rail when closed. Panel content is unrestricted.

groups.title: DockPanelRail
groups.description: Layout container for one or more DockPanel instances. Stacks vertically below xl and sits in a row at xl and up.

props.name: children
props.description: One or more DockPanel children.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the rail.

props.name: …div attributes
props.description: Native div attributes on the rail root.

groups.title: DockPanel
groups.description: Root panel. Pass title and subtitle for a convenience header, or compose Header, Body, and Footer manually.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Initial open state when uncontrolled.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when the open state changes.

props.name: size
props.description: Expanded width at xl and up. Maps to --df-dock-width-* tokens.

props.name: mobileMaxHeight
props.description: Open max-height below xl. Maps to --df-dock-mobile-max-height-* tokens.

props.name: title
props.description: Eyebrow label in the convenience header. When title or subtitle is set, children render inside DockPanelBody.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Primary heading in the convenience header.

props.name: titleVisible
props.description: Show the eyebrow title. When false, the subtitle centers with the collapse control.

props.name: subtitleVisible
props.description: Show the primary heading. When false, the title centers with the collapse control.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name for collapse and expand controls when title or subtitle is not a string.

props.name: dismissible
props.description: When true, closing removes the panel from the rail instead of showing the collapsed expand chip. Defaults the header control to a close icon and Close {label}. Use for temporary tune panels opened from another surface.

props.name: collapseIcon
props.description: Icon for the collapse or dismiss control. Defaults to X when dismissible, otherwise PanelLeft.

props.name: expandIcon
props.description: Icon for the collapsed expand control. Defaults to collapseIcon, then PanelLeft. Ignored when dismissible, because closed panels leave the rail.

props.name: collapseLabel
props.description: Accessible name for the collapse or dismiss control. Defaults to Close {label} when dismissible, otherwise Collapse {label}.

props.name: expandLabel
props.description: Accessible name for the expand control. Defaults to Expand {label}.

props.name: collapsedLabelVisible
props.description: Show the text label on the collapsed rail. When false, only the icon chip is shown.

props.name: collapsedAlign
props.description: Placement of the expand control on the collapsed rail. start aligns to the top at xl, or the leading edge below xl. center places it in the middle.

props.name: variant
props.description: ScrollArea thumb style on the convenience DockPanelBody. Use edge with side left for a thin thumb on the panel leading border.

props.name: side
props.description: ScrollArea thumb placement on the convenience DockPanelBody.

props.name: thumbShape
props.description: ScrollArea thumb shape on the convenience DockPanelBody.

props.name: visibility
props.description: ScrollArea thumb visibility on the convenience DockPanelBody.

props.name: space
props.description: ScrollArea track inset on the convenience DockPanelBody. none overlays the thumb with no reserved gutter.

props.name: orientation
props.description: ScrollArea axes on the convenience DockPanelBody.

props.name: width
props.description: ScrollArea scrollbar thickness in pixels on the convenience DockPanelBody.

props.name: viewportClassName
props.description: Classes on the ScrollArea viewport inside the convenience DockPanelBody.

props.name: children
props.description: Panel content. With a convenience header, children fill DockPanelBody. Otherwise compose Header, Body, and Footer as needed.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the panel root.

props.name: …aside attributes
props.description: Native aside attributes on the panel root.

props.name: children
props.description: Typically heading text and DockPanelCollapseTrigger.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the header.

props.name: …div attributes
props.description: Native div attributes on the header.

props.name: children
props.description: Eyebrow text.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the title.

props.name: …p attributes
props.description: Native paragraph attributes.

props.name: children
props.description: Heading text.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the subtitle.

props.name: …p attributes
props.description: Native paragraph attributes.

groups.title: DockPanelCollapseTrigger
groups.description: Control that collapses an open panel.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon for this trigger. Overrides collapseIcon from the root.

props.name: children
props.description: Custom trigger content. Replaces the default icon when set.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the trigger.

props.name: …button attributes
props.description: Native button attributes (onClick, aria-label, title, and others).

groups.title: DockPanelExpandTrigger
groups.description: Control shown when the panel is collapsed.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon for the expand chip. Overrides expandIcon from the root.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label on the collapsed rail.

props.name: showLabel
props.description: Show or hide the collapsed label for this trigger. Overrides collapsedLabelVisible from the root.

props.name: children
props.description: Custom trigger content. Replaces the default chip and label layout when set.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the trigger.

props.name: …button attributes
props.description: Native button attributes (onClick, aria-label, title, and others).

groups.title: DockPanelBody
groups.description: Expanded content region. Always wraps children in the kit ScrollArea. Do not nest another ScrollArea inside.

props.name: children
props.description: Panel content.

props.name: space
props.description: ScrollArea track inset. none overlays the thumb with no reserved gutter. auto reserves inset when that axis overflows.

props.name: variant
props.description: Passed through to ScrollArea.

props.name: thumbShape
props.description: Passed through to ScrollArea.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Passed through to ScrollArea.

props.name: side
props.description: Passed through to ScrollArea.

props.name: visibility
props.description: Passed through to ScrollArea.

props.name: width
props.description: Passed through to ScrollArea as scrollbar thickness in pixels.

props.name: viewportClassName
props.description: Classes on the ScrollArea viewport.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the body shell.

props.name: …div attributes
props.description: Native div attributes on the body shell.

groups.title: DockPanelFooter
groups.description: Optional region below the scrolling body for footnotes, disclaimers, or actions.

props.name: children
props.description: Footer content.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the footer.

props.name: …div attributes
props.description: Native div attributes on the footer.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-dock-width-sm
props.description: Expanded width for size sm.

props.name: --df-dock-width-md
props.description: Expanded width for size md.

props.name: --df-dock-width-lg
props.description: Expanded width for size lg.

props.name: --df-dock-width-xl
props.description: Expanded width for size xl.

props.name: --df-dock-collapsed-size
props.description: Collapsed rail width and mobile collapsed height.

props.name: --df-dock-mobile-max-height-sm
props.description: Open max-height below xl for mobileMaxHeight sm.

props.name: --df-dock-mobile-max-height-md
props.description: Open max-height below xl for mobileMaxHeight md.

props.name: --df-dock-mobile-max-height-lg
props.description: Open max-height below xl for mobileMaxHeight lg.

props.name: --df-shadow-dock-chip
props.description: Shadow on the collapsed expand chip.
